cycle_1.security-auditor: CONDITIONAL — no length bound on backend value; ValueError propagated as raw traceback through cmd_migrate; regex lacked re.ASCII; partial-write window.
cycle_1.edge-case-hunter: FAIL — BLOCKING x2: non-atomic write ordering (hedl.toml before context.json) could leave a stuck migration / duplicate [state] on corrupt partial write; dual-write inconsistency. SIGNIFICANT: uncaught exception + silent-swallow of corrupt TOML.
cycle_1.historian: CONDITIONAL — WORK-0032/0033 ACs still referenced .work/context.json for state_backend (downstream drift).
cycle_1.simplicity-enforcer: PASS — text-append writer + injection guard proportionate for the RCE-area; 5 tests not redundant.

fixes: Added _validate_backend_name with length<=64 + re.ASCII identifier guard (TOML-injection defence; hedl.toml is the gate command surface).
Reordered migration: validate + write hedl.toml before bumping/writing context.json; archive moved after the hedl.toml write to avoid churn on failure.
_set_hedl_state_backend now raises on a corrupt hedl.toml (no silent-swallow) and on a [state] table lacking 'backend' (no duplicate-header append) instead of blindly appending.
cmd_migrate wraps fn(work_dir) in try/except (ValueError/OSError/JSON/TOML decode) -> clean exit 1 with message, no traceback or re-archive loop.
Reconciled WORK-0032 and WORK-0033 ACs to hedl.toml [state] backend.
Tightened backend regex to forbid trailing hyphen.

cycle_2.edge-case-hunter: PASS — both BLOCKING resolved; ordering + raise-on-corrupt + cmd_migrate catch verified. New findings MINOR only.
cycle_2.security-auditor: CONDITIONAL -> [state]-without-backend duplicate-header SIGNIFICANT (now fixed: raises); trailing-hyphen MINOR (fixed); archive-churn MINOR (fixed).

deferred_minor: _state_backend() returns an unknown hedl.toml backend value verbatim (falls through to local-file) — pre-existing behaviour, not introduced here.
_load_hedl_config swallows a corrupt hedl.toml -> None -> local-file (shared with [verify]/[gate]); broader change, deferred.
_schema_ver_int maps a non-integer schema_version to 0 — pre-existing.
verdict: RESOLVED — zero BLOCKING remaining after 2 cycles; deferred items are MINOR/pre-existing, noted for /phase-complete.
